articles.title: Trump expected to award World Cup trophy on Sunday - The Washington Post
articles.description: The U.S. president is set to attend the final match between Argentina and Spain, and FIFA’s leader has said “the plan” is for Trump to help present the trophy.
articles.content:
President Donald Trump is expected to present the World Cup trophy after Sundays final match between Argentina and Spain.
Trump is set to attend the match at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.
